title: Update UTC timezone display format and add local time above UTC Offset Selection

requirements.summary: Modify WebsiteLayoutPanel to display local time with UTC offset inline in the date string format
acceptanceCriteria: Local time displays in format 'Month Day, Year (UTC +/-offset)' where offset is calculated from the default search location
The display updates when default search location changes
The format shows the timezone offset of the local time, not UTC+0

file_operations.description: Update the local time display to show UTC offset inline within the date string (e.g., 'February 24, 2026 (UTC +8)' instead of separate UTC+8 label). Modify the component to fetch timezone offset based on defaultSearchPlace coordinates using timezoneUtils, format the date with the inline offset, and update the display when defaultSearchPlace changes. Remove or repurpose the separate UTC offset label element.

requirements.summary: Add local time with UTC offset display above the 'Select UTC Offset' button in LocationMapExplorer
acceptanceCriteria: Local time with UTC offset displays above the 'Select UTC Offset' button
Display updates in real-time as the globe location changes
Format matches the WebsiteLayoutPanel format: 'Month Day, Year (UTC +/-offset)'

file_operations.description: Add a new display element above the 'Select UTC Offset' button in the globe controls section that shows local time with UTC offset in the format 'Local Time: Month Day, Year (UTC +/-offset)'. Use the current globe camera/marker position coordinates to calculate timezone offset via timezoneUtils. Ensure the display updates in real-time when the globe location changes and matches the format implemented in WebsiteLayoutPanel.
